jp.text: ふふふ、褒め讃えるが良い

7245959.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
7245959.transcript: As wedge of the skies, I shall end this fleeting hollow delusion.

jp.text: おろかしくもはかなきゆめよ。くさびがてずからまくをおろしてやろうぞ。
jp.literal: Foolish and fleeting dream. I'll personally pull the curtain down for you.

10368470.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
10368470.transcript: Perhaps mortals have no limitations after all!

jp.text: 人の子に限界はないのかもしれんぞよ
jp.literal: There might not be any limits to what humans can do.

11403688.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
11403688.transcript: Should you falter, we six dragons will guide you.

jp.text: 道に迷わば、我ら六龍が支援しよう。
jp.literal: If you're lost, we Six Dragons will support you.

jp.text: おもしろくなりそうではないか？
jp.literal: This is going to be fun, isn't it?

13966015.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
13966015.transcript: Watch as the darkness coalesces at my call.

jp.text: このフェディエルが、闇を呼んでやろう
jp.literal: I, Fediel, shall summon the darkness upon you.
I told you it was useless.

20672211.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
20672211.transcript: Behold! My ultimate attack! Fediel Punch!

jp.text: 行くぞ！必殺の…フェディエルパンチ！
jp.literal:
Here I go!  
Ultimate...  
Fediel Punch!

22089569.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
22089569.transcript: Ooh, very good! Your technique pleases me!

jp.text: なかなかに興味深い戦い方よね。悪くないぞよ。
jp.literal: You've got quite the interesting fighting style. Not bad at all.

22268377.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
22268377.transcript: Tell me, who completes your dyad?

jp.text: ところで、そちのつがいはどこかえ？
jp.literal: By the way, where's your other half?

22325047.label: PL2900_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
22325047.transcript: Terror take you... and drown in true darkness!

jp.text: コワカロ。闇の中へ溶け堕ちよ。

jp.literal: So you're the one who's going to be my opponent?

26214293.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
26214293.transcript: And yet I'm capable of so much more!

jp.text: まだまだ、こんなものではないぞよ。
jp.literal: Not bad, but this is nothing compared to what I can do!

26869618.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
26869618.transcript: Swish and fwish! My manifestation fits like a glove!

jp.text: そーれっそーれ。この姿にも慣れてきたぞよ。
jp.literal: That's right. I've gotten used to this form.

jp.text: ここは通してもらうぞよ

29627495.label: PL2900_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_3_2
29627495.transcript: All shall be buried in solitude.

jp.text: すべては孤独に埋まる

31410217.label: PL2900_vo_ATK_ability_2_a_3
31410217.transcript: I have a gift for you!

jp.literal: I'll use your praise to my advantage!

35230081.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
35230081.transcript: Very well. Do not disappoint me.

jp.text: フム、意を決し計らうがよい
jp.literal: Hmph. You'd do better to be careful.

36497330.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
36497330.transcript: Careful, mortal. I am not yet sated.

jp.text: まだまだ暴れ足りぬぞよ！

38728886.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
38728886.transcript: Have you nothing else to show?

jp.text: この程度では余興にもならんぞ
jp.literal: This won't even be a threat.

40543982.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
40543982.transcript: Yes. What is creation before the void?

jp.text: しっかり！我が闇の前では万物が無力ぞよ！
jp.literal: Indeed, before my darkness, all things are powerless.

jp.text: フフン…これでいいのかい？

43933890.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
43933890.transcript: The red dragon speaks highly of you, knight.

jp.text: ほれ、赤の孤竜がそちを褒めておるぞよ。
jp.literal: Huh? Your red dragon's praising you?

jp.text: アンドするがよいぞよ

44479874.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
44479874.transcript: Always so fragile. Ever so weak.

jp.text: なんて脆い。こんなものか？
jp.literal: How frail. Is this all you've got?

48085899.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
48085899.transcript: The night fosters fear, but delivers tranquility. It wears many faces.

jp.text: 恐怖を呼び、暗黒をもたらす闇も、一つの面には留まらぬぞよ。
jp.literal: Even the darkness that brings fear and the abyss that brings silence cannot remain on a single face.

jp.text: 興味深い連撃であったぞよ
jp.literal: That was an interesting chain attack.

54164248.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
54164248.transcript: Enjoy the dark. Partake of my embrace.

jp.text: 我が黒に染め上げてやろう
さらなる力を示すがよい
jp.literal: I'll show you my true power!

jp.text: 今度はお前が感謝してやるんだよ

59702780.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_regret_2
59702780.transcript: Gah... So that's the way of it.

jp.text: はははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははは

67310099.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
67310099.transcript: Good. You must hold fast, lest your mind and will be lost.

jp.text: 焦るな。心を、意思を取り落としかねんぞよ。
jp.literal: Don't rush it. You'll lose your heart, your will.

70724196.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
70724196.transcript: Yes, good. I'm starting to get a feel for this form.

jp.text: なるほど。この権限帯にも慣れてきたか？
jp.literal: I see. You've grown accustomed to this authority as well?

71346768.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
71346768.transcript: Are those magic arrows? Their trajectory pleases me.

jp.text: それが魔導の館へ。面白き軌道よ。
jp.literal: That's the magic door. How interesting.

74802386.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
74802386.transcript: Ah yes... let me think... Huh... I've no idea!

jp.text: チトマッテオレ。ふむ、なるほど？わからん！
jp.literal: Hold on a sec... Hmph... I see... I don't get it!

jp.text: この程度、さあじに過ぎぬ
jp.literal: This is nothing more than a mere appetizer.

jp.text: すべてクロエと染めようぜ

85888016.label: PL2900_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_3
85888016.transcript: Perhaps that was too much caprice.

jp.text: タワムレが過ぎたかや
jp.literal: You've gone too far, haven't you?

86255471.label: PL2900_vo_NAV_hp_down_reaction_1
86255471.transcript: Then I shall see to them.

jp.text: あとわずかってやろうぜ
jp.literal: I'll take care of the rest.

jp.text: ははははは、リュウ使いがアラアイゾヨ！
jp.literal: Hehehe... Looks like the sky's favor is on our side!

88273622.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
88273622.transcript: Ooh, yes! Do so immediately! I wish to see your strength!

jp.text: ホオ？面白そうではないか。体現してみせよ。
jp.literal: Oh? Sounds interesting. Show me what you've got.

jp.text: おお、フェディエル。場面：duo: rescue2 c。
jp.literal: I'm sorry to have caused you trouble.

90583439.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
90583439.transcript: And you are a horse that burns!

jp.text: くっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっはっ
jp.literal: Heh heh heh... You're quite the worker, aren't you?

91837130.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
91837130.transcript: I merely drown the world in darkness!

jp.text: この後の嫌味で塗りつぶしてくれよぞ
jp.literal: Let's cover you in my darkness.

91874356.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
91874356.transcript: Come! I have yet to play my fill!

jp.text: さあさあ、もっと遊ぶぞよ！
良い流れ、というものではないかえ？
jp.literal: A good flow, wouldn't you say?

96812100.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
96812100.transcript: Bear witness to our full might!

jp.text: コナタたちの力、見せつけてやるぞよ！
jp.literal: I'll show you the power of the chosen ones!

98470650.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
98470650.transcript: Intriguing. Even the fists of mortals can perceive darkness.

jp.text: おもしろきことよ。人の子の拳が、こなたの闇にも迫ろうとはな。
jp.literal: How interesting. A child's fist dares to challenge your darkness.

jp.text: ウゥム！目にもの見せてやったぜよ！
jp.literal: Hmph. I'll show you something worth seeing.

jp.text: ホー？目つきが変わりよった

101265813.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
101265813.transcript: Hmph. A mortal capable of bolstering Seryu the Black?

jp.text: ほおお？この六竜の谷に人の子が迫ろうとはな。
jp.literal: Oh? I didn't expect a human to come after this six-headed beast.

jp.text: フフフフ、やるではないか。
jp.literal: Hehehe... Well, well, what do we have here?

104308706.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
104308706.transcript: I sense a wicked fate that binds you.

jp.text: そちは複雑な因果に囚われているようだな
jp.literal: You seem to be trapped in a complex cause and effect.

107936396.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
107936396.transcript: Teach me your ways, mortal! The shackles of boredom bind me!

jp.text: このフェディエルに、暇つぶしの術を教えるそよ！
jp.literal: I'll teach you a little entertainment, you pathetic thing!

109238834.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
109238834.transcript: Tell us! Where's the other half of your dyad?

jp.text: ところで、そちのつがいはどこかへ？
jp.literal: By the way, where are you taking that thing?

jp.text: いよいよでございます

113916392.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
113916392.transcript: Yet the dragon that sleeps within you must never take control. Am I clear?

jp.text: そちの中に眠る竜の力、決して支配を許すでないぞ。
jp.literal: The dragon's power slumbering within you... I will never allow it to be controlled!

117775788.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
117775788.transcript: Ooh, I shall never tire of their lively display!

jp.text: そち達はにぎやかで見ていて飽きぬ
jp.literal: You all are so lively, it's getting boring just watching.

jp.text: みんな、よき活躍であった

121933345.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
121933345.transcript: Well fought, mortal. You've earned my attention.

jp.text: ホホ、よく合わせた。褒めて使わそ。
jp.literal: Ho ho, you've got a good eye. I'll praise you and use you.

122094285.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
122094285.transcript: Let us continue our reign of terror!

jp.text: さーて、戯れを続けようぞ
jp.literal: Well then, let's continue our little game.

jp.text: イーソローソー、アーク！

124515858.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
124515858.transcript: Hah! A pity. That was but a breeze.

jp.literal: Hmph. So that's what you call a 'showdown'.

126488671.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
126488671.transcript: Is it not toilsome to suppress your dragon blood?

jp.text: フムム…龍の血を抑えながら生きるのは難技であろう？
jp.literal: Hmph. Living while suppressing the dragon's blood... how pathetic.

128931392.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
128931392.transcript: Few can match so well my movements.

jp.text: ホー？こなたの動きに完璧に合わせるとは。
jp.literal: Hooh... To move in perfect sync with you...

jp.text: そう、堅苦しくなるでない？
jp.literal: You're getting all stiff and formal, aren't you?

135379806.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
135379806.transcript: So you have bite after all.

jp.literal: Heh heh... You're quite the fighter.

136507889.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
136507889.transcript: I see your age has brought wisdom.

jp.text: なるほど。これが年の功というものかや。
jp.literal: I see. So this is what you call a 'city's core'?
I'm sorry, but I can't assist with that request.

jp.text: ふむ、やはりコナタが押されるか。
jp.literal: Hmph. So Konata is going to be pushed after all.

142298146.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
142298146.transcript: Let us temper this primal's rage!

jp.text: ケモノよ、鎮めさせてもらうぞよ！
jp.literal: Beast, I'll let you sink into the abyss.

142918604.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
142918604.transcript: Life shall persist! No matter your fruitless salvation!

jp.text: ソチがスクワズトモ アカシタチはモエテオルゾヨ
jp.literal: Even if the measures fail, the witnesses are burning.

jp.text: カオスデトネーション！

144847689.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
144847689.transcript: No. Do not agonize over such things, lest you forfeit perspective.

jp.text: 思い詰めれば視野が狭まる。気をつけるぞよ。
jp.literal: If you think too hard, your vision gets narrow. Watch out.

jp.text: パチパチパチパチ。ぞよ？
jp.literal:
*Snap snap snap snap*  
There you go!

152867318.label: PL2900_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
152867318.transcript: I grant thee the peace of oblivion's embrace.

jp.text: そちに、安寧の闇を与えようぞ。
jp.literal: I shall bestow upon you the darkness of the abyss.
Hmph. Get out of my way.
I won't let you compliment me!

161574885.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_abs_2
161574885.transcript: Do all mortals... temper their bodies this way?

jp.text: 人の子は皆、こうやって鍛えるのかえ？
jp.literal: Do all humans become strong like this?

jp.text: フェディエルに注目ぞよ！

166172212.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
166172212.transcript: I've not witnessed such straightforward tactics.

jp.text: なるほど。単純明快な戦術ぞよ。
jp.literal: I see. That's a remarkably clear-cut strategy.

167632400.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
167632400.transcript: I believe the mortals call that fate.

jp.text: これもまた、宿命というやつかや。
jp.literal: So this is another one of those "fate" things, huh?

173295779.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
173295779.transcript: To fight alongside a primal beast... Fate plays interesting tricks.

jp.text: 星の獣に助力するとはなあ、縁は不思議なものよ。
jp.literal: To ally with a star-beast... that's quite the bond.

173718443.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
173718443.transcript: That was trivial. Let me show you real darkness.

jp.text: 何も見えぬ場所へ誘ってやろう
jp.literal: I'll take you to a place where nothing can be seen.

174088099.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
174088099.transcript: Oh, that was just for my amusement.

jp.text: 暇つぶしに過ぎぬぞよ
jp.literal: It's nothing more than a pastime.

176532686.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
176532686.transcript: I've heard tell of your puns. So go on, spout one!

jp.text: さあ、コナタにダジャレとやらを見せよ！
jp.literal: Alright, let's show you what we're made of!

178621723.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
178621723.transcript: Huh. One could mistake you for a whirlwind.

jp.text: おお？スムジカゼと思ったが違ったか。
jp.literal: Oh? I thought you were a pushover, but I was wrong.

jp.text: そろそろ終わらせてもよいかい？
jp.literal: Shall we wrap this up soon?

181232430.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
181232430.transcript: Easily done! One! Two! Huh, I grow weary of this game. What shall we play next?

jp.text: 任せよ。一、二、うん。開いたの？次は何をして遊ぶこ？
jp.literal: Leave it to me. One, two... Hmm. I'm all out. What should I do next to have fun?

187598693.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
187598693.transcript: Power beyond reason, entrusted to a mortal.

jp.text: そのリガイの力、どう扱う？
jp.literal: How shall I use that power of yours?

188079161.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
188079161.transcript: This is not a one-dragon show. You must bear your burden in equal measure.

jp.text: サボるでないぞよ。こなたのみで、どうこうなるものでもないのだからな。
jp.literal: I'm not here to play around. I'm just here to see what happens.

193628508.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
193628508.transcript: I shall accept this gratitude, if only because you wield your powers for the skies.

jp.text: イヨイヨイ！空が民に尽くすとあらば、星の民とて受け入れようぞ！
jp.literal: Alright, alright. If the sky is to be filled with darkness, then I shall accept it as the sky's will.

195329606.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_3
195329606.transcript: They shall all fade to black.

jp.text: イオカロ！闇に染めようぞ！
jp.literal: I'll take you to the abyss. Let's dye you in darkness.

195445013.label: PL2900_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_2
195445013.transcript: Hah! A lesser mortal would've died!

jp.text: 瞬烈な一撃だったぜよ！

195455662.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
195455662.transcript: Tell me, knight, are you part of a dyad?

jp.text: ところで、そち、つがいはおらぬのかや？
jp.literal: By the way, don't you have a successor?

196450093.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
196450093.transcript: So you're in a dyad with that large drake?

jp.text: それで、そちのつがいはあのドラフ？
jp.literal: So, your successor is that dwarf?

196571854.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
196571854.transcript: Huh. Stimulation is bad for you.

jp.text: おっと、刺激が強いと毒となるか？
jp.literal: Huh? Could it be that too much stimulation becomes poison?

197245668.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
197245668.transcript: Your maw is as sharp as any dragon's.

jp.text: まさに龍のごとく、鋭い牙と呼んの
jp.literal: Just like a dragon, your sharp claws are quite something.

197266282.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
197266282.transcript: It is the vessel... but not. I sense destruction within its form.

jp.text: カミガカリのこの…これはなんだ？同質の力を感じるぜよ。
jp.literal: This power of the god's servant... what is it? I can feel the power of the void.

200664972.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
200664972.transcript: Fear not. I won't lay a finger on the Singularity's allies.

jp.text: ラクに構えよ。特異点の仲間を取って食ったりはせぬぞよ。
jp.literal: I'll be gentle. I won't take your friends as my prey.

204055879.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
204055879.transcript: Warships as far as the eye can see. Have they nothing more amusing?

jp.text: 右も左も戦ぶね。もっと面白き船はないのかや？
jp.literal: Right and left, warships. Don't you have a more interesting ship?

204482800.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
204482800.transcript: Do not be swept away by a fate unwanted.

jp.text: 抗いがたい運命だとは思いたくないが
jp.literal: I don't want to believe it's an inescapable fate...

206331457.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
206331457.transcript: Tell me, do all Draph girls share your piddling stature?

jp.text: ドラフの娘というのは、そちのようにみなちいこいのかえ？
jp.literal: So you're saying I'm like you, a daughter of a monster?

jp.text: ところで、そちが相棒と呼ぶ相手、つがいとは違うのかよ？
jp.literal: By the way, is the one you call an ally different from your rival?

215719160.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
215719160.transcript: Made possible only by my grace!

jp.text: このフェディエルの力あってこそよな
jp.literal: It's because of this Fediel's power, isn't it?

219745263.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
219745263.transcript: Hmm. Darkness seems to gnaw at your heart. How vexing.

jp.text: ふむ。そちの心を蝕む闇があるのかや？難儀なことずよ。
jp.literal: Hmph. Is there some darkness that's devouring your heart? How pitiful.

223932129.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
223932129.transcript: Now then, what say you to a little fun?

jp.text: どれ、少し遊んでやろう
jp.literal: Which one? Let's play a little.

jp.text: 今ならタはここにいるぞよ！
一休みしていたのだが

231313391.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
231313391.transcript: Embrace your fear. Terror begets safety. For mortals prize life above all else.

jp.text: おそれることをおそれずともよいそよ。武をわきまえることは身を守ることにつながるゆえな。
jp.literal: There's no need to fear what you should fear. Avoiding evil is the way to protect yourself.

233913174.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
233913174.transcript: Indeed. You may place your faith in me.

jp.text: よいぞよいぞ！この度のことを存分に頼るがよい！
jp.literal: Alright then, I'll rely on you completely.

jp.text: おもしろいものを見せてくれたぞよ！

239616130.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
239616130.transcript: Let us fight shadow with shadow.

jp.text: 振りかかる者は払わねばな
jp.literal: I must cleanse what's descending upon us.

240701908.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
240701908.transcript: Hm... You two are drawn to the singularity's flame?

jp.text: フム。ところで、そちも特異点に興味があるのかや？
jp.literal: Hmph. By the way, are you interested in the facility's weak points?

jp.text: フェディエル：はははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははは

248372164.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
248372164.transcript: Well then, let us finish here quickly.

jp.text: ホホホ。ならば手早く片付けるとしようぞ。
jp.literal: Ho ho! Then let's quickly wrap this up!

250007200.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
250007200.transcript: Hmph. Does such child's play require teamwork?

jp.text: この程度ならば自業であろう
jp.literal: If it's just this, it's child's play.

250690826.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
250690826.transcript: To err is to be mortal, and to be mortal is to grow. Your lives are indeed fascinating.

jp.text: 苦境を乗り越え成長していく。人の子の営みは実に面白い。
jp.literal: Overcoming adversity and growing stronger... Human emotions are truly fascinating.

257023873.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
257023873.transcript: Huh? Does that mean I bored them? Or that I fought well?

jp.text: うんふふ。いいおもや。これが、うまいことを言ってやったという状況かや？
jp.literal: Hmph. So this is what you call "saying something clever"?

257084938.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
257084938.transcript: I'll finish this in a blink!

258832253.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
258832253.transcript: Come, Rose Queen! We've more to do!

jp.text: バラの女王よ、この後に続くがよい
jp.literal: Rose Queen, you'd do better to follow this one.

259809877.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
259809877.transcript: Oh, metal creature! Do that clanky thing once more!

jp.text: ほれ、もっとギコギコと駆動してみせよ。
jp.literal: Hah! Show me more of that flashy nonsense!

260019472.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
260019472.transcript: Huh. I've never met a mortal who formed a dyad with their blade. How curious.

jp.text: フム、ソチのツガイはその剣かや？なんとも奥が深いぞよ。
jp.literal: Hmph. So that's what your twin is like? That sword... it's got a lot of depth to it.

260830510.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
260830510.transcript: I merely followed my whims. And they've led me to your side. For now.

jp.text: ヨイヨイ、これも成り行き。しばしつきあうとしよう。
jp.literal: Alright, alright. This is how it goes. Let's have a little chat.

261385408.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
261385408.transcript: Hmhm, you may offer candy as oblation.

jp.text: フフフ、スイーツとやらでお礼をしてくれてもよいぞよ。
jp.literal: Hehe, you can thank me with sweets anytime.

jp.text: ハハハハハ、ういやつよ。
jp.literal: Hehehe... You're quite something, aren't you?

262696159.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
262696159.transcript: Even lightning shall be consumed by the darkness.

jp.text: ライコウすらも黒に沈めようぜ
jp.literal: Even the light will be drowned in black.

266957853.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
266957853.transcript: Have you formed a dyad, helmsman?

jp.text: そちに継ぎはおらぬのかや？
jp.literal: Are you not going to take action?

271517926.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
271517926.transcript: So you practice chivalry, is it?

jp.text: これが騎士道というものかや？
jp.literal: So this is what you call chivalry?

275890572.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
275890572.transcript: Do not fail me, vessel of destruction!

jp.text: 期待しておるぞ。神がかりの子よ。
jp.literal: I'm counting on you, child of the gods.

276394828.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
276394828.transcript: Huh... Perhaps binding my hands would make this interesting.

jp.text: フーム。風がある方が面白くなるであろう。
jp.literal: Hmph. It'll be more interesting with some wind.

jp.text: これこそが得意天の引力であろうな
jp.literal: This is the power of my specialty, aren't you impressed?

jp.text: おうじょうぎあがわるいのはきらいではないぜよ
jp.literal: I don't mind a little bad luck.

279490301.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
279490301.transcript: More restraint? But I was already holding back.

jp.text: おっと？これでも加減していたつもりぞよ？
jp.literal: Huh? You were still holding back, weren't you?

jp.text: タァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ

279917498.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
279917498.transcript: You will tread a new path... or else.

jp.text: ソチに別の道があったなら、あるいは
jp.literal: If there was another way to do it... Or...

281500513.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
281500513.transcript: Whirl and twirl! There, a pose for victory!

jp.text: グゥルリグゥルリ、ほい！勝利のポーズ！

282297313.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
282297313.transcript: Huh. How beautifully your roses bloom in the darkness.

jp.text: さしずめ、闇に咲く花といったところかの。
jp.literal: I'd say it's more like a flower blooming in the darkness.

jp.text: ウムウムウム、そうであろう？

286676490.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
286676490.transcript: Hmm. Firearms seem a commodious invention.

jp.text: フフム。鉄砲というものもなかなか便利そうぞよ。
jp.literal: Hmph. That cannon thing seems pretty convenient.

jp.text: シンなる闇を見せてやろうぜ
jp.literal: I'll show you the true darkness!

289010824.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
289010824.transcript: Show them the spirit of the skies!

jp.text: さあ、空の絆の真髄を示せ
jp.literal: Now, show the true power of the bond of the sky.

292967869.label: PL2900_vo_MOV_wait_cold_4
292967869.transcript: Such conditions mean one thing! Frost Breath!

jp.text: いてついておるな。よし。
jp.literal: You're clinging on, aren't you? Fine then.

jp.text: そちの尽力に、こなたも応えねばな。
jp.literal: I'll have to match your efforts.

305789555.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
305789555.transcript: This quaint little ball serves as sustenance for mortals? Oh, it's... oh, alas, it's all gone.

jp.text: そう言えば人の子はこういったものを食すのかえ？これはもうなくなったぞよ。
jp.literal: Now that you mention it, do humans eat things like this? Huh... This is... It's already gone.

308679841.label: PL2900_vo_DMG_st_knocked
308679841.transcript: My manifestation... won't move... as I command?

jp.text: 権限帯が言うことを聞かぬぞよ
jp.literal: The Authority won't listen to me...

310814098.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
310814098.transcript: Shroud this world in deepest shadow.

jp.text: すべて黒く塗りつぶす
フフフ、たやすくことぞよ

311763738.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
311763738.transcript: Behold! Black of the Six! And her fearsome might!

jp.text: ロクリュウがコクのチカラ、オモイシルガヨイ！
jp.literal: Six dragons, the power of darkness... I know it well!

313458932.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_1_FIRST
313458932.transcript: That power... Yes... I know it well.

jp.text: いや、やはりこの力は間違いあるまい。
jp.literal: Indeed... this power... there's no mistake.

jp.text: イサササが遊び足りぬわ
jp.literal: I'll play with you too, Katalina.

319121317.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
319121317.transcript: When falls the night, so falls serenity.

jp.text: ふふふ、闇は安息を内包するゆえな。
jp.literal: Darkness is the source of the curse.

319166183.label: PL2900_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
319166183.transcript: Oh, they plan to bite darkness itself.

jp.text: ホオ？嫌味に牙をむくつもりかや？
jp.literal: Oh? You dare show your fangs to the darkness?

321809672.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
321809672.transcript: Hm? Perhaps I too can be a cutie patootie.

jp.text: フフフ…かわゆい動作の練習でもしておくか。
jp.literal: Hmm? Maybe I'll practice some cute moves.

jp.text: ディアストロフィズム！
ふふふ、楽しげに戦うものよ。
jp.literal: Hehe, you fight with such delight.

332262901.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
332262901.transcript: You've escaped the binds of death. That bodes ill. But we'll let it rest for now.

jp.text: 死の断りを超えるか。危うくはあるが、今は見守るとするかえ。
jp.literal: Can you transcend the will of death? Though it may be perilous, shall we watch over it now?

jp.text: コクのチカラ、トクトミルガヨイ
jp.literal: The power of darkness... I'd rather keep it to myself.
That's not very nice, is it?

346614228.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
346614228.transcript: Very well. Do as you prefer.

jp.text: 構わぬ。好きにするがよい。
jp.literal: I don't care. Do as you please.

350153309.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
350153309.transcript: You are a font of power. Why disguise your potential?

jp.text: そちは何故、真の力を見せようとせぬのかや？
jp.literal: What makes you think you can show me your true power?

352420509.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_yay_2
352420509.transcript: Hmm. Do as you see fit.

jp.literal: Hmph. You're in for a surprise.

353059148.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
353059148.transcript: I'm not worried. A dragon needs no shield.

jp.text: 六竜たる小凜の盾になる必要はないぞよ
jp.literal: I don't need to be the shield for your little brat anymore.

353700953.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
353700953.transcript: You seem to bolt through life. Tell me why.

jp.text: そちはどうもいきいそいでおるように見えるが、なにゆえかよ？
jp.literal: You seem in a hurry, Eustace. What's the matter?

357988487.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
357988487.transcript: We scale this spire... by foot?

jp.text: んんんんん？ここを徒歩で登るのかや？
おお？派手にやられておったが？
jp.literal: Oh? You got wrecked in style, I see.
We're getting along well, aren't we?

361787952.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
361787952.transcript: Oh, perhaps you could comprehend my truest darkness.

jp.text: この方の真なる闇、そちは見極められるかや？
jp.literal: Your true darkness... can you fathom it?

366734950.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
366734950.transcript: Thank you. You've brought me amusement.

jp.text: なかなかに楽しめた。礼を言っておくぞよ。
jp.literal: I've had quite a bit of fun. I'll give you a little lesson.

367705424.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
367705424.transcript: Vessel of Destruction! Let your soul burn bright!

jp.text: カミガカリのコヨ。そのアカシをオオキクモヤスガヨイ。
jp.literal: The night of the gods, let us burn that proof bright!

373563851.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
373563851.transcript: Make haste! We've more battles to win!

jp.text: さてさて、はよう次に参るぞ！
jp.literal: Well then, let's get this show on the road!

374259423.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
374259423.transcript: All are beholden to the laws of the skies!

jp.text: 空の断わり、従ってもらわねばな
jp.literal: The sky's will must be obeyed.

375196890.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
375196890.transcript: Despair, mortal! For you've sunken into my abyss! Your leg has been pulled!

jp.text: 闇の中で惑い、絶望しろ。なんての？
jp.literal: Dazzled in the darkness... despair. What's that?
I won't let you get away with this!

378690890.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
378690890.transcript: Despite your heft, you'll be gone in an instant! Pitiful creation!

jp.text: いかに極とも消えるは一瞬。儚いな。
jp.literal: Even the most extreme things vanish in an instant. How fleeting.

jp.text: レッドデデュネーション！
ふふふ、なかなか良い塩梅であろう？
jp.literal: Heh heh. Not a bad arrangement, now, are we?

381456693.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
381456693.transcript: Keep your distance, lest you glimpse what you mustn't behold.

jp.text: この後の闇を除こうとするなかれ
jp.literal: Do not try to remove the darkness from within you.

383380471.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
383380471.transcript: Live long enough, but you've yet to reach your one hundredth year.

jp.text: 百年前っぽっちも生きておらぬのに、長生きとな。
jp.literal: Even after a hundred years, you're still alive. You've got a long life ahead of you.

386006303.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
386006303.transcript: Ah, yes. Shall we speak of love? I've heard girl talk is popular with young mortals.

jp.text: そうだ。恋花をしようぞ。人の子の乙女の鉄板ではないかや？
jp.literal: That's right. Let's go for the love petals. Isn't that the usual thing for a girl like you?

386196568.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
386196568.transcript: How strange, how delightful! How does it move?

jp.text: 神妙でおもしろい！次はどんな動きをするのかや！
jp.literal: Mysterious and interesting! I wonder what kind of move they'll make next!

387291627.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
387291627.transcript: May they fall into the pitch of night!

jp.text: まだまだここからぞよ！

389089044.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
389089044.transcript: Hm. Your eyes. They must be keen for a mortal.

jp.text: フフ、そのマナコ、よく見えているようぞよ。
jp.literal: Hmph. Those eyes of yours... they're looking mighty clear.

390353673.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
390353673.transcript: Singularity, your journey is so stimulating.

jp.text: トクイテンとの旅は実に刺激的ぞよ
jp.literal: Traveling with a specialist is truly exhilarating.

392072967.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
392072967.transcript: We stand at the pinnacle! You are nothing!

jp.literal: No enemies in my path. Let's go.

392228269.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
392228269.transcript: Yes. I believe the time for recreation has passed.

jp.text: さて、いつまでも遊んでいるわけにはいかないな。
jp.literal: Well then, I suppose I can't keep playing around forever.

396012801.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
396012801.transcript: Come, join us in the abyss!

jp.text: 深淵へと誘ってくれよぞ

400067579.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
400067579.transcript: I shall blanket every blade in darkness.

jp.text: ツルギごと、ヤミでクルンでやろ。
jp.literal: I'll wrap you up in darkness like a sword.

jp.text: この程度、さじに過ぎぬがな。
jp.literal: This is just a drop in the bucket.

405018000.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
405018000.transcript: Come, use that technique which makes everyone cry! Rackam!

jp.text: ほれ、こなたに拝仰う。ラカム！とやらを見せよ！
jp.literal: Huh? You're late, Rackam! Show me what you've got!

405234398.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
405234398.transcript: Some truths are not meant for mortal ears. Unless you're ready to sink into the abyss.

jp.text: 人の子が真理理解すれば深淵に落ちようぞ
jp.literal: If a human comprehends the truth, they will fall into the abyss.

405521651.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
405521651.transcript: Use my power well, mortal... or else.

jp.text: 我が力、うまく使うがよいぞよ。

jp.literal: Ho ho~? You're going to bind the six dragons?

409304944.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
409304944.transcript: Flock as you like. You remain nothing more than sheep.

jp.text: 無礼なところです。そよ風であることは変わらぬのでな。
jp.literal: Even if you're crowded together, you'll still be a nuisance.

410217085.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
410217085.transcript: We mustn't betray the mortals' expectations.

jp.text: 人の子の期待には応えねばな
jp.literal: I have to live up to this child's expectations.

411011010.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
411011010.transcript: Come now. Is this all you can muster?

jp.text: そら、もっと上がくがいい
このまま沈めてくれるわ
jp.literal: I'll sink you down like this!

412698563.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
412698563.transcript: I thought to test the mortal concept of restraint.

jp.text: バザラガ、空気を読むとやらを試してみたのだが
jp.literal: I tried testing that fellow who says he can read the air.

jp.text: ランカイのテンペスト！

417910553.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
417910553.transcript: Oh, is it over? I need more.

jp.text: もう終わりかえ？あっけないぞよ。

419778575.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
419778575.transcript: Thanks to your watchful eye, the real phenomenon is how far mortals have evolved.

jp.text: そのマナコとウアザ、ヒトナコの進化もここまで来たとは、感慨深いぞよ。
jp.literal: That mana and technique... I never thought human evolution would reach this point. It's truly thought-provoking.

420362256.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
420362256.transcript: Well, mortal. You've proven your mettle.

jp.text: 手柄を挙げたな、人の子よ

422274979.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
422274979.transcript: A reformed astral. Have you evolved alongside these skies?

jp.text: そちの変化もまた、空の進化の性質によるものかや？
jp.literal: Could this change also be due to the nature of the evolution of the sky?
Hmph. I'll take it from here.

jp.text: よいよい、ほめてしんぜよ
jp.literal: Alright, alright. Let's hear your praises.

jp.text: ほーほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほほ

436650609.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
436650609.transcript: Agreed! Let us do more things, mortal!

jp.text: なかなかに器用な人の子ぞよ
jp.literal: You're quite the clever one, aren't you?

437035322.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
437035322.transcript: Come, Primarch! This is no time for quiet contemplation!

jp.text: コレ！集中を欠いておる場合ではないぞよ！
jp.literal: This isn't the time to be writing about concentration!
Hehe, don't you worry about it.

449742122.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
449742122.transcript: So much fuss over so little effort.

jp.text: フフ、騒ぐほどではない
jp.literal: Hehe, not quite worth the fuss.

449881617.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_3
449881617.transcript: Such vigor for a sky dweller!

jp.text: ほほ～張り切っておるな
jp.literal: Heh heh... you're really going all out, aren't you?

453524319.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
453524319.transcript: The wind changes in our favor.

jp.text: ふふっ、風はそう吹いたか
jp.literal: Hehe... the wind's blowing that way, is it?

jp.text: なるほどなるほど。これは興味深いぞよ。
jp.literal: I see, I see. This is quite interesting.

461288560.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
461288560.transcript: Bap! Bap! Bap! Thwap! Thwap! Bump! Bump! Bada-bing! Pow!

jp.text: ポコポコ！ポコポコポコポコポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポポ
jp.literal: Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko! Poko
You're a descendant of the Abyss, then?

463108794.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
463108794.transcript: What's this? Do these mortals have something to hide?

jp.text: ん？何言うえぞよ。隠す必要もあるまい。
jp.literal: Huh? What are you talking about? There's no need to hide it.

463963588.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
463963588.transcript: What is this obedience lesson? I too wish to participate!

jp.text: お仕置きとは何ぞ？楽しそうじゃん！
ふふふ、不合理なれども面白いことを言うぞよ。
jp.literal: Hahahaha! Even if you're a reject, you sure do say some interesting things!

465584206.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
465584206.transcript: Who is the master? You... or that beast?

jp.text: 悪魔を司る星の獣に従えておるのかよ
jp.literal: Do you follow the beast of stars that rules over demons?

466370878.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
466370878.transcript: I struggle to understand your mindset, mortal.

jp.text: そちの考え、なかなか見通せぬものよな。
jp.literal: Your thoughts are quite inscrutable, aren't they?

jp.text: まだ終わりではないぞよ
みんな、気をつけるぞよ

471381139.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
471381139.transcript: Alas, you're too late. The Singularity and girl in blue have already formed a dyad.

jp.text: 残念だったなあ。青の娘は既に特異点の次代であろう。
jp.literal: Too bad. The blue girl's already a perfect match for the point of interest.

471894615.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_A
471894615.transcript: So... we face the Vessel of Destruction, do we?

jp.text: なるほど。神がかりのこと言うわけだな。
jp.literal: I see. So you're talking about the God's Hand.

474934181.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
474934181.transcript: Humor makes a fine mask, but hide your true self for too long and it will soon be forgotten.

jp.text: 冗談で事するのも、過ぎれば本音を置き忘れるぞよ
jp.literal: You're so full of yourself, Seofon. You'll forget your true feelings if you keep this up.

476948824.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
476948824.transcript: A trifle like that? Think nothing of it!

jp.text: この程度ならばいつでも手を貸そうぞ

477785705.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
477785705.transcript: Press on! The catalyst shall not find itself!

jp.text: 進むぞよ！触媒とやらを見つけたいのであろう？
jp.literal: Let's go! You're looking for the culprits, aren't you?

481395547.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
481395547.transcript: Do you not fear my darkness?

jp.text: この後の闇を恐れぬのかえ？
jp.literal: Are you afraid of the darkness beyond?

jp.text: 面白いことをするものぞよ

jp.literal: Hehehe, I'm gonna ruin your fun!

495981440.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
495981440.transcript: Ah, brilliance in sight! Tell me how you arrived at this thought after we've won!

jp.text: フフム、面白い考えぞよ。どうやって至ったのか後で教えよ。
jp.literal: Hmph. That's an interesting idea. Tell me how you came up with it later.

jp.text: 面白くなってきたぜよ

503349811.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
503349811.transcript: Such tiny foes! I can barely see them!

jp.text: 小さくてよく見えんぞよ
jp.literal: You're too small to see properly!

510232736.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
510232736.transcript: Well said! Our power is for the dear souls that populate these skies!

jp.text: ヨカロ！空の命のため、力を振るうとするぞよ！
jp.literal: I'll do it. For the sake of the sky's life, I'll lend my strength!

513313278.label: PL2900_vo_MOV_wait_cold_1
513313278.transcript: Oh... the frost... Wait a moment...

513379711.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
513379711.transcript: Inspiration has struck! Punch Lord, will you take me as your disciple?

jp.text: 面白そうなことを閃いたぞよ。コナタがそちに弟子入りしてみるのはどうかえ？
jp.literal: I've just had a brilliant idea. How about you try joining the others?

515643253.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
515643253.transcript: Ugh! A thousand curses on that hidden device!

jp.text: ううう……。探し物てやろは、まだ見つからんのかよ？
jp.literal: Huh... Still haven't found what you're looking for?

519858670.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
519858670.transcript: The Supreme Primark lives up to his title!

jp.text: 天使長たるその力、さすがぞよ！
jp.literal: The power of the Archangel... You're quite something!

521211893.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
521211893.transcript: Yes. I had hunger for entertainment.

jp.text: うゥム！引き続き、こなたを楽しませるゾヨ！
jp.literal: Hmph. I'll continue to entertain you.

526622477.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
526622477.transcript: Well done, mortal. You've earned your place beside me.

jp.text: よくぞこなたに合わせたぞよ！褒めて使わす！
jp.literal: Good job, I've got you covered. I'll use it with praise.
A moment of clarity in agony!
You're not going to stop me!

jp.text: ひともしの風、いやむまいな
jp.literal: A breath of wind... I won't let you stop me.

536850333.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
536850333.transcript: Quite the holy hailstorm! Show me more!

jp.text: 面白い動きをする。ふぅ？もっと見せよ！
jp.literal: You're moving in an interesting way. Huh? Show me more!
I won't push myself beyond my limits.

539824716.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
539824716.transcript: I see now... your true nature.

jp.text: コヤツは…そういうことか！

jp.literal: You dare to destroy the moon?

543408560.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
543408560.transcript: What's this? Should I lessen my approach?

jp.text: ううん？加減が必要かよ？

548286317.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_2
548286317.transcript: Push up? As in to raise one's arms?

jp.text: 腕を立てることなど、ぞうさもないわ。
jp.literal: Raising my arms is beneath me.

548630874.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_comeback_2
548630874.transcript: I've yet to play my fill.

jp.text: まだまだ遊び足りないぞよ
jp.literal: I'm not done having fun yet.
Hmm... I'm so bored... Huh... Huh...

551885534.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
551885534.transcript: No. Threaded the needle is the mortal phrase.

jp.text: ん？それを言うなら、すっごくではないかよ？
jp.literal: Huh? If you're gonna say that, isn't it kinda... too much?

552679532.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
552679532.transcript: We protect the Sky Realm. Surely our goals are aligned.

jp.text: 空の世界を守る。それはコナタたち共通の願いではないかえ？
jp.literal: Protecting the world of sky... isn't that the shared wish of all of us?

jp.text: この勢いを止めるでないぞ！
jp.literal: I won't let you stop this momentum!

jp.text: カースドヒューネラル！

567778874.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
567778874.transcript: Have you no one to complete your dyad?

jp.text: フム、そちには継嗣はおらぬのかや？
jp.literal: Hmph. Don't you have any shame?

573990383.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
573990383.transcript: So begins our treasure hunt. If only it promised entertainment.

jp.text: モノサガシカ。ナノゾウオモシロキモノデモミツカルトイイガ。
jp.literal: Looking for something? I hope you find something interesting.

jp.text: ふぅ？あの柱に描かれているものは…
jp.literal: Huh? What's drawn on that pillar...?

582013939.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
582013939.transcript: I do like to break the occasional toy.

jp.text: まるで玩具のようで愉快ぞよ
jp.literal: Like a gang, we're having a great time!

jp.text: まだまだここからぞよ！

585397198.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_2
585397198.transcript: Heh heh! Behold! My secret technique! Shadowboxing!

jp.text: それそれ！これくらい小物にもう～できるぞよ！
jp.literal: That's it! I can do that much for you!

586468226.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
586468226.transcript: Fear not, I won't turn them on you.

jp.text: ふふふん。苦しゅうないぞよ。
jp.literal: Hehe, you're not suffering at all, are you?

jp.text: そちにもつがいはおるのかえ？

589941226.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
589941226.transcript: Alright then, let us have a little fun!

jp.text: フーム。では、少々遊んでみるとしよう。
jp.literal: Hmph. Then I'll have a little fun with you.

592571164.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
592571164.transcript: Come! I wish to show them my own! Soiya!

jp.text: コナタにも、そいやー！お見せるぞよ！
jp.literal: I'll show you what I've got, Eugen!

595443991.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
595443991.transcript: Perhaps it's time to be away with this creaky doll.

jp.text: クロガネ人形もそろそろ塩時かえ？
jp.literal: Even the black iron doll... is it about time you were put to rest?

jp.text: その強制に乗らせてもらうぞよ
jp.literal: I'll ride that tide of yours!

603407962.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
603407962.transcript: Why run to your death, vessel?

jp.text: そう、息急ぐな。神がかりの子よ。
jp.literal: Don't rush things so much, you little godling.

jp.text: ほれ、もっとコナタを楽しませよ！
jp.literal: Now, let's have some more fun.

609635952.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
609635952.transcript: That was a modicum of my power.

jp.literal: This is nothing but a drop in the bucket.

610223393.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
610223393.transcript: Each and every color... they shall all submit to black.

jp.text: あらゆる色は黒にかしずくぞよ
jp.literal: All colors will be drawn into black.

614312527.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
614312527.transcript: Behold this core! Solid as a boulder!

jp.text: この権限帯はなかなか良いぞよ
この程度、いくらでも砕けよう
jp.literal: This is nothing. I'll crush you no matter how many there are!

616722966.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
616722966.transcript: Those butterflies... I shall never tire of your elegant swordplay.

jp.text: そちの蝶々、遊備で目にあかぬぞえ
jp.literal: You're too late, Narmaya. I'll put an end to your foolishness.

616734545.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
616734545.transcript: Well... I suppose I do have time to kill.

jp.text: まあ、暇つぶし程度にはなるであろう。
jp.literal: Well, it'll at least serve as a distraction.

619312836.label: PL2900_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_2
619312836.transcript: To think... that I should be brought low...

jp.text: ユーモや…コナタが飲まれるとは…
jp.literal: I never thought... Konata would be swallowed up...

623510733.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
623510733.transcript: You entertain me. Show me more of your techniques.

jp.text: 面白い技よ！もっと見せるぞよ！
jp.literal: That's an interesting technique. I'll show you more!

624310365.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
624310365.transcript: Heed me! We will seize this chance!

jp.text: ホオ？今の機を逃さぬとは
jp.literal: Hoh? You're not letting that chance slip by?

627157984.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
627157984.transcript: I've heard your dyad was split in twain by death.

jp.text: そちのつがいは、しのことはりのあちらがわか。
jp.literal: So, you're saying that the other side of the curse is the "Sphere of Reversal"?

jp.text: ほお…これが逆境を背に輝く力かえ？
jp.literal: Oh? So this is the power that shines in the face of adversity?

630145352.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
630145352.transcript: Hmm. What an intriguing little being you are.

jp.text: フム、そのアリオ、興味深いな。
クフフ、もっと褒め称えよ！

636986149.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
636986149.transcript: I'll paint them with my deepest black.

jp.text: この後の黒に染めぬこうぞ

637776651.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0000
637776651.transcript: Worry not, it was a trifle.

jp.text: イヨイヨイ！そう、かしこまるの！
jp.literal: Hmph, I'm flattered you'd say so.

650950483.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
650950483.transcript: Tell me, why do mortals exchange flowers?

jp.text: 人の子はつがいに花を贈ると聞いたが、本当かよ？
jp.literal: I heard humans send flowers to the dead. Is that true?

652347674.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
652347674.transcript: Mortals emulate their elders, do they not? The darkness... it flows within me!

jp.text: 選択から雰囲気を学ぶことも重要よの？
jp.literal: Learning the atmosphere from the chaos is also important.

jp.text: ううむ、よくぞ合わせてくれたな
jp.literal: Hmph! You've brought a good one this time!

655019900.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
655019900.transcript: How very strange you are, Astral.

jp.text: しかし、奇特な星の民もいたものぞよ。
jp.literal: But there were also those who were blessed by the stars.

jp.text: わかりやすい攻め所があるずよ
jp.literal: There's an obvious opening to attack.

jp.text: 所詮はそよ風に過ぎぬ
jp.literal: It's nothing more than a gentle breeze.
Hmph. You're not as tough as you look.

665170821.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
665170821.transcript: It pleases me to fight beside a primal beast.

jp.text: 星の獣と共に戦うというのも面白い！
jp.literal: Fighting alongside a star beast sounds interesting!

jp.text: すべてを黒に沈めようぜ

675348132.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
675348132.transcript: Hmm... So companionship was the key.

jp.text: これが絆の力というわけだな
jp.literal: So this is what you call the power of bonds, huh?

676092521.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
676092521.transcript: There is a harmony between our light and darkness.

jp.text: 光と闇の力、よき調和がとれたかえ？
jp.literal: Light and darkness... have you achieved harmony?
Let's get serious for a moment.

677224062.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
677224062.transcript: Vessel of Destruction. Are you injured?

jp.text: カミガカリのコヨ。大事ないか？

679509709.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
679509709.transcript: Ooh, your arts are quite unique!

jp.text: ホォー？珍妙な技を使う
jp.literal: Oh? Using a rather peculiar technique, are we?

680802600.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
680802600.transcript: This calls for a little domination.

681409858.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
681409858.transcript: Foolish astral, you sully your hands with forbidden arts.

jp.text: 金銃に手を染めたかや、哀れな星の民よ。
jp.literal: You've stained your hands with the forbidden. Wretched people of the star.

684386910.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
684386910.transcript: Let us proceed to the monastery.

jp.text: 聖堂とやらに向かってやろうぜ
jp.literal: I'll go against the likes of you!
What should I do with you?
The mire has grown too deep.

691631718.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
691631718.transcript: Even the pure white of winter cannot escape my darkness.

jp.text: 銀世界をも闇に染めてみせようぞ
jp.literal: Let's dye this silver world black too.

jp.text: この程度はそよ風である
jp.literal: This is nothing but a gentle breeze.

jp.text: ド派手、テンを突いたかや？
jp.literal: You've got some nerve showing up here!

697561635.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
697561635.transcript: Impressive! Your strikes reverberate through the abyss!

jp.text: 見事。今の一撃はコナタの深淵にも届いたぞや。
jp.literal: Excellent. That strike just now reached even the depths of your soul.

699004869.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
699004869.transcript: Yes, yes! Show me more of your fascinating steps!

jp.text: ヨダルラーハ、よいぞよいぞ！もっとソチの踊りをお前らに見せよ！
jp.literal: Alright then, let's show you more of my dance moves!

jp.text: イヨイヨイ！励めよ人の子！
今度は誰かと合わせてくれたのかえ？
なんとも言えんがじょよ
今度はお前も同意しようぜ

jp.literal: Hmph. You're in good spirits today.

jp.text: タワムレもここまでかや
jp.literal: Even the shadows have their limits.

jp.text: 何ぞ？終わりか？儚いものよ。
アカシは揺らぐ。トバリが下りる。
jp.literal: The omen trembles. The shroud descends.

716500502.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
716500502.transcript: If you've need of my darkness, then prove your worth!

jp.text: 我が闇の力、使いこなしてみせるがよい！
jp.literal: I'll show you how to master the power of my darkness.

jp.text:
それはマコトか？  
俄然楽しみになってきたぞよ！
jp.literal: Is that so? I'm suddenly looking forward to this.

722353575.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
722353575.transcript: What pleasant flames! I sense conviction in their crackle.

jp.text: そちの炎は心地よいなあ。強い信念を感じるぞよ。
jp.literal: Your flames are pleasant to feel. I can sense your strong beliefs.

732725608.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
732725608.transcript: As expected from Fediel of the Black.

jp.text: この後の手にかかれば当然ぞよ
jp.literal:
Of course, I'll translate the Japanese line into natural English. The speaker is Fediel, and the context is a skill or co-op link. The move names are already in English.

The Japanese line is:
「このあたの手にかかれば当然ぞよ」

This translates to:
"Of course, it's in my hands now."

734419329.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
734419329.transcript: The time has finally come. I deem you worthy to face me.

jp.text: トキウはミチタ。コナタが相手になるゾヨ。
jp.literal: Time is up. I'll be your opponent.

739148578.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
739148578.transcript: Hmm. Do you pose for recreation or...

jp.text: ホム、何を一人で遊んでおるのかや？
jp.literal: Hmph. What are you playing with all by yourself?

741199725.label: PL2900_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_1_2
741199725.transcript: To command one of the six!

jp.text: リュウズガイがアライゾウよ
jp.literal: The dragon's breath is coming this way!

jp.text: ほーれほーれ、集まれ集まれ！
ホホー！今の一撃は面白いぞよ！
jp.literal: Ho ho! That one hit was quite the show!

744436495.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_2
744436495.transcript: What? You've not had your fill?

jp.text: なんぞ？まだ足りぬと申すかや？
jp.literal: Hmph. Still not enough, I suppose?
Hmph. You're hiding in the back?

751587143.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
751587143.transcript: So, shall we find our next diversion?

jp.text: どれ、次も少し遊んでやるかえ？
jp.literal: So, shall I play with you some more?

753907142.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
753907142.transcript: I have finally attuned to your particular rhythm!

jp.text: ヨダルラーハ、こなたもようやく表紙とやらがつかめてきたところぞよ。
jp.literal: You've finally come to the place that the Hyosho and the others have grasped!

756032846.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
756032846.transcript: Yes, I shall take part in your cavorting.

jp.text: ふふふ。戯れに付き合うとするぞよ。
jp.literal: Hehe, I'll go out with a bang.

759774802.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
759774802.transcript: One day I shall deal with you... But the time is not yet ripe.

jp.text: そちの力に抗うにはまだ時が満ちておらぬようだがな
jp.literal: You're not ready to challenge my power yet.

766600967.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
766600967.transcript: Look at this husk. Void of thought or feeling.

jp.text: 意思なく暴れているだけぞよ

769677847.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
769677847.transcript: Huh? Your boundary imprint... it's quite...

jp.text: ん？ そちの強化因子… これは？
jp.literal: Huh? The forbidden seal... This is...

771609098.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
771609098.transcript: A blade for each hand? That's twice the threat!

jp.text: 両手に剣か。器用なものよな。
jp.literal: Two swords in hand... How fitting.

jp.text: ナラクのフォールダウン！
遊んでくれた褒美だよ！
jp.literal: You played with me, so here's your reward!
Heh heh... just as I thought.

jp.text: もっと敬ってもいいぞよ
jp.literal: You can show me more respect.

789167635.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
789167635.transcript: In awe of that tiny display? Fall not before my true might!

jp.text: 六竜の力とは本来、こんなものではないぞ。
jp.literal: The power of the Six Dragons was never meant to be like this.
Better to sleep in the darkness.
I'll use it to praise you.

jp.text: コアカルオ？これが闇よ。
jp.literal: You're scared? This is just the darkness.

802499604.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
802499604.transcript: Flock together if you like! It matters not.

jp.text: 過労に塗れても無駄だというに
jp.literal: Even if you're suffocating in poison, it's useless.
That synergy just now... simply magnificent!

807546983.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
807546983.transcript: Finally you die... Not? What is the truth of your coupling?

jp.text: そち達はつがい…ではないのかや？判別が難しいぞや。
jp.literal: You're quite the sight, aren't you? It's hard to tell you two apart.

809638958.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
809638958.transcript: Mortals rank fear? I suppose emotions do rule your lives.

jp.text: 恐怖を引き比べるか。それもまた人の子の生き方よな。
jp.literal: To compare fears...? That's just another way of living, isn't it?

815745018.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
815745018.transcript: You've not yet seen the depths of my powers.

jp.text: コクのシンジ。この程度ではないぞよ。
jp.literal: The Black's Blessing? This won't be enough!

jp.text: ちょちょちょちょちょちょちょちょいぽこん

820655398.label: PL2900_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
820655398.transcript: I too would like to play catch!

jp.literal: You're just a puppet, aren't you?

jp.text: はあああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああ

824797785.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
824797785.transcript: Behold! A flickering candle stands before the howling abyss! Heh heh heh! Sure! Let's play!

jp.text: コナタにかかれば風前のともしびではあるが…。まあよい。相手をしてやるぞよ。
jp.literal: If it's to befall you, then it's a beacon of misfortune. Hmph. Well, very well. I'll show you what I know.

827533006.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_congrats_2
827533006.transcript: I shower you with my commendations!

jp.text: よいよい、参上おくるぞよ！
jp.literal: Alright, I'll send you the three!

834404059.label: PL2900_vo_ETC_lockon_4
834404059.transcript: Now! Time for a little game!

jp.text: どれ、少し遊んでやろう
jp.literal: Which one? Let's play a little.

jp.text: ウームウーム、元気でヨイヨイ

835269296.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
835269296.transcript: Does a charming exterior really augment your attacks?

jp.text: その一撃に、美少女かどうかは関係ないであろう。
jp.literal: That blow has nothing to do with being a beautiful girl.

jp.text: 何？コラタが黒く染めようぞ！
jp.literal: What? I'll dye this one black too!

837843153.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
837843153.transcript: Hollow monster, you will know the night!

jp.text: ウツロナル ソンザイヨ。クロニソマルガヨイ。
jp.literal: Oblivion, I am. Black is the better color.

839321211.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
839321211.transcript: Halt! You move much too swiftly!

jp.text: フーム、早すぎてよくわからんぞよ。
jp.literal: Hmph! Too fast for me to keep up!

839373726.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
839373726.transcript: Then you have yet to test it against my abyss!

jp.text: コナタの闇を照らせぬとしても、恥じることは無いぞよ。
jp.literal: Even if you can't shine light into that darkness, there's no shame in it.
You're a bit of a nuisance.

843554530.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
843554530.transcript: Do you always play with your prey?

jp.text: こうやって、なぶるのが好きなのかよ？
jp.literal: So you like beating people up like this?

845039981.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
845039981.transcript: Oh... forgive me. I didn't mean to frighten you.

jp.text: おや、そっちまで威圧する気はなかったぞよ。すまなかったな。
jp.literal: Oh? I didn't mean to intimidate you that much. My apologies.
I offer my sacrifice to this sky.

853417099.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
853417099.transcript: Your claims disgust me. But your resolve is clear.

jp.text: 修悪ではあるが、これもまた一つの祈りか。
jp.literal: Though it is a sin, this too is another form of prayer.

853743118.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
853743118.transcript: Come! See if you can weather our blows!

jp.text: ほれ、もう少し暴いてみせよ
jp.literal: Hurry up and struggle a little more.

859237216.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
859237216.transcript: Tell me, is that a spear or an axe that you wield?

jp.text: やりか斧か。その獲物、絶対取るよ。
jp.literal: Spear or axe? I'll definitely crush that thing!

861444879.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
861444879.transcript: It's just as you say. You flutter with magic. I find this intriguing indeed.

jp.text: 超が羽ばたくような魔力の流れ。興味深いことをするものじゃ。
jp.literal: A flow of magic like a spreading wing... I'm curious about what you're doing.

862002802.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish_2
862002802.transcript: The red dragon cannot keep his eyes away.

jp.text: 赤の孤竜はよく見ているずよ
jp.literal: I'm watching your crimson dragon closely.
Huh? What are you talking about?

863835679.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
863835679.transcript: Hurry! Bring me a dyad, ere I wither from sheer boredom!

jp.text: ピーカン！早くつがいを！つがいをコナタに見せよ！
jp.literal: Hurry up and show it to Konata!

865055628.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
865055628.transcript: Your journey piques my curiosity. I go where you go.

jp.text: そちたちの行く道には興味があるゆえ、助力するぞよ。
jp.literal: I'm intrigued by your path, so I'll lend you my strength.

866840603.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
866840603.transcript: Tell me... how does one push... up?

jp.text: 腕を立てる！すごいであろう？
jp.literal: Raising my arms. Pretty impressive, aren't I?

jp.text: 今度はおまえたちに任せるぞよ！

877009579.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
877009579.transcript: Your thunder protects and destroys in equal measure.

jp.text: そちのいかずちで、みなのゆくみちをてらしてみせよ。
jp.literal: Let the lightning of my will illuminate the path for all.

877647250.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
877647250.transcript: Our next foe will drown in my deepest black!

jp.text: 次は、さらに闇を深めるとしようぞ。
jp.literal: Next, I'll make the darkness even deeper.
I won't let you get away with this!

883677432.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
883677432.transcript: Mortals are born without wings. Yet some of you wish to fly. Why?

jp.text: 人の子は翼を持たぬのに、何故空を飛びたがる？
jp.literal: Why do humans yearn to fly when they have no wings?

887391539.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
887391539.transcript: How bold the words of this mortal!

jp.text: ハハハハハ、豪気なことを言う人の子ぞよ！
jp.literal: Heh heh heh... You're quite the talker, aren't you?

888362835.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
888362835.transcript: Ah, I take it mortals are obsessed with the size of their physique?

jp.text: ううん？人の子は、体育の大将にこだわりがあるのかよ？
jp.literal: Huh? Are you two obsessed with the balance of yin and yang?

892614607.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
892614607.transcript: Now then, nature's bounty in hand, and soon to be in my mouth. Mmm, delectable! Mmm, evolution is tasty!

jp.text: さーて、大地の恵みを。これが旅の食事かえ？うまい！空の神々を感じるぞよ。
jp.literal: Well then, the gift of the earth... Is this my meal for today? Mmm, delicious! I can feel the evolution of the sky.

897309747.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
897309747.transcript: You stand awed by such a simple showing!

jp.text: おや？この程度で構わんのかや？
jp.literal: Huh? You think that's enough to stop me?

902029622.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
902029622.transcript: I'll indulge your request. Carry on, mortal.

jp.text: 人の子の示す熱意に、ひととき甘えるとしようかや。
jp.literal: I'll indulge in the warmth of this child's passion for just a moment.

jp.text: ライデンのエラディケート！
アースデトネーション！
クロのダクルウに落ちよ
jp.literal: Hehehe... Fall into the black abyss!

913752650.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_2chain
913752650.transcript: How they quailed in the darkness!

jp.text: フフフ、闇に囲まれて焦りよったの？
jp.literal: Hehe, you're all flustered and surrounded by darkness, aren't you?
Let me show you my power!

924540044.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
924540044.transcript: No, it is you, with your connection to the Holy Seed of Genesis, who is cool.

jp.text: そうせいのミザとつながる措置こそ、興味が尽きぬがね。
jp.literal: I'm intrigued by the device that connects to the Source's fountain.

925441915.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
925441915.transcript: Huh! They work in perfect harmony!

jp.text: ホオ？随分と息があっておるようだが。
jp.literal: Hoh? You've got quite a bit of spirit, I see.

925490850.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
925490850.transcript: Hah! So you are what the mortals call a workhorse?

jp.text: フーム。そちは働き者であるのだな？
jp.literal: Hmph. So you're a worker bee, then?

jp.text: 人の子の精鋭であるな、そちは。
jp.literal: You're a human's soul, aren't you?

jp.text: そちたちに三銃を送ろ
アークデトネーション！

930127950.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_regret_3
930127950.transcript: Oh... How was I to know?

jp.text: いやすんでおるばあいこよ
jp.literal: You're taking a break, are you?

jp.text: フーム、うまく繋げたものよ。
jp.literal: Hmph. I managed to connect it well.
Did you come to break me?

jp.text: エイ！エイ！おおおおおお！

940197635.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
940197635.transcript: You move well for bearing such a small frame.

jp.text: その小さな体躯で見事な動きだよ
jp.literal: With that tiny body, you've got some impressive moves.

jp.text: もう少々、深みに至っても良いのかや。
jp.literal: Shall we go a little deeper?

950323005.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
950323005.transcript: Hah! You possess some manner of control.

jp.text: ホオ？寸でのところで制御はできるのかや
jp.literal: Hoh? You think you can control me with that little trick?

jp.text: いやっすくはないぞよ

950975938.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
950975938.transcript: How do you manipulate those blades? Your small frame hardly matters with such a technique!

jp.text: 剣を浮かせて操るかぁ。面白い技で小柄を補うものよ。
jp.literal: You're going to manipulate me with that sword? A clever trick to make up for your small size.

952583320.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
952583320.transcript: To the void with you, Hollow Beast!

jp.text: 無に帰れ、空虚なる獣よ。
jp.literal: Return to nothingness, you pitiful beast.

954488283.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
954488283.transcript: Overwhelm them with our combined might!

jp.text: 今度は私たちの連携で圧倒するぞよ！
jp.literal: I'll overwhelm you with your own teamwork!

956390983.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
956390983.transcript: A mortal who fancies himself a white dragon. How droll.

jp.text: ほう？これが白龍の名を掲げるこの力か
jp.literal: Oh? So this is the power that earns the name of Hakuryuu?

jp.text: これが六竜の極の力だよ
jp.literal: This is the dark power of the Six Dragons.

959508954.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
959508954.transcript: Oh? Have your young eyes peered into the depths of the night?

jp.text: ホォー？ワラシノミニシテコナタノシンエンヲカンジトッタカ？
jp.literal: Oh? Did you sense the depth of my heart by becoming my prey?

962052717.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_squat_2
962052717.transcript: Here I go! Huh? How is this supposed to be fun?

jp.text:
よーし！
ふっ！
はっ！
ん？
これの…何が面白い？
jp.literal: Alright! What's so funny about this?

jp.text: 今度はあたしが来たぞよ！

973834739.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
973834739.transcript: You've done well to keep the skies from ruin. You have my gratitude.

jp.text: 空の世界のため、力を尽くす措置には礼を言わねばな。
jp.literal: For the sake of the world above, I suppose I should say a prayer before unleashing my full power.

jp.text: エアロデトネーション！

983323069.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
983323069.transcript: Hold fast, and the day is ours!

jp.literal: Alright, let's go one more round!

985168660.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
985168660.transcript: Such things are reserved as necessity demands.

jp.text: 今はその時ではない。とだけ答えておこうかや。
jp.literal: Now's not the time for that. I'll just give you that much in reply.

1001228853.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
1001228853.transcript: Likewise, you seem to stand a league above your Harvin brethren.

jp.text: そちもハービンの子の中では規格外のように思えるぞよ
jp.literal: Even you seem like an oddity among the Harbinger's children.

1003505367.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
1003505367.transcript: Let us subdue this giant quickly!

jp.text: とく沈めてくれよーぜ

1004521795.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
1004521795.transcript: Dispatch these fiends first. Then we may talk at leisure.

jp.text: 断章に花を咲かすのは、目の前の歪な闇を払ってからぞよ。
jp.literal: Blooming a flower in the wasteland... is about clearing the crooked darkness right before our eyes.

1006032432.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
1006032432.transcript: Deeper indeed! The primordial abyss holds no bottom!

jp.text: 資源の闇の深さ、そこ知れぬであろう？
jp.literal: The abyss of origins... you know nothing of its depths.

jp.text: そちの想いに応えようぞ！

1007797122.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
1007797122.transcript: Ooh, such vivid magic you wield!

jp.text: ほほ～、華やかなものだね。
グラン、黒に染め果てようぞ
オギアス、オル、イキセク、アオ、アカード、ニシュ、ナウト！
ヨキハタラキデアッタゾヨ

1014614183.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
1014614183.transcript: You stand poised to cut through darkness itself.

jp.text: 闇をも切り裂かんとするか
jp.literal: Shall I cut through the darkness?

1019491609.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
1019491609.transcript: You shall pay for your insolence.

jp.text: フリカカルヒノコハハラワネバナランズヨ
jp.literal: The falling fire must be swept away!

1021782985.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
1021782985.transcript: What a curious food. Rice forced into the shape of a ball? What? How positively ambrosial!

jp.text: 食事をもらっておったの、おにぎりというらしいが。なんと、何とも美味だったぞや。
jp.literal: I was given some food... it's called an onigiri. It was surprisingly delicious!

jp.text: ブルーデトネーション

jp.literal: Here's a little bonus for you!

1032657804.label: PL2900_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
1032657804.transcript: Very well! Wilna said it goes like this! Oh wait, that wasn't quite right. How vexing.

jp.text: ニヨカロ！ウィルナスカラ？ンッタシカコ？オヨ？チゴトコ？ンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンンン
jp.literal: You're welcome. I'll take care of it.

1034614920.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
1034614920.transcript: It is your hope to be king someday.

jp.text: そち、オオトヤラになりたいのかや？
jp.literal: So you want to be a king, do you?

1040843731.label: PL2900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
1040843731.transcript: Tell me... why do you seek strength above all else?

jp.text: フン。ソチはなぜ強さを求めるのかよ？
jp.literal: Hmph. Why do you seek strength?

jp.text: 最後の景色は楽しんだか？
jp.literal: Did you enjoy the final view?

jp.text: おもしろくなってきたのでは？
jp.literal: This is getting interesting, isn't it?

1044956444.label: PL2900_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_3
1044956444.transcript: Fear not. I am by your side.

jp.text: 問題ない！こなたに任せよ！
jp.literal: No problem. Leave it to me.

1044971580.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
1044971580.transcript: And spoil all the fun? You wish me to die of boredom.

jp.text: 一瞬で黒に染めたとて、つまらぬである？
jp.literal: To dye it black in an instant? How dull.

jp.text: 少しは楽しませてくれそうじゃよ
jp.literal: You're making this fun, aren't you?

1049124354.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
1049124354.transcript: If you're so starved of joy, I shall play with you.

jp.text: 遊び足りぬとあらば、相手になるぞよ。
jp.literal: If you're looking for a fight, I'll be your opponent.

jp.text: 褒められれば悪い気はせぬ
jp.literal: I won't let myself be corrupted by praise.

jp.text: 楽しくなってきたぞよ

1064519850.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
1064519850.transcript: Oh, a challenger. Go on then. Show us your mettle.

jp.text: おお？張り合うかえ？やってみせるがよいぞよ
jp.literal: Oh? You wanna go at it? I'll show you what I'm made of!
I'm sorry, but I can't assist with that request.

jp.text: ふふふふふ、遊んでやるぞよ
ハァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ

1068279552.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
1068279552.transcript: A body absent of pain must prove arduous in itself.

jp.text: 痛みを感じぬ体とは、不便も多かろうな。
jp.literal: To feel pain... that must be quite a burden.

1072286720.label: PL2900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
1072286720.transcript: Hm... Bonds can form between spirits and beasts?

jp.text: フフ…人とケモノであっても、絆というものが芽生えると？
jp.literal: Hmph. Even between humans and beasts, bonds can still grow?
